Name: CAMERA_EVENT_PARAM
Description: Defines parameters relating to the camera used in event menus.

Fields.Name: Camera Behavior Type
Fields.Description: The behavior to use for this camera.

Fields.Name: Camera Reference Point Type
Fields.Description: The reference point to use for this camera.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Field of View
Fields.Description: The field of view (in degrees).

Fields.Name: Axis Offset: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The axis offset on the x-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Axis Offset: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The axis offset on the y-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Axis Offset: Z-Axis
Fields.Description: The axis offset on the z-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Ray Width
Fields.Description: The thickness of the camera ray.

Fields.Name: Collision Size
Fields.Description: The collision size of the camera.

Fields.Name: Additional Turn Radius
Fields.Description: The additional turning radius of the camera (in metres).

Fields.Name: Fulcrum %
Fields.Description: 0 is the target, 1 is the reference point.

Fields.Name: Rotation: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The rotation of the camera on the x-axis (in degrees).

Fields.Name: Rotation: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The rotation of the camera on the y-axis (in degrees).

Fields.Name: Interpolation Time: Transition Start
Fields.Description: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the start of switching.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Time: Transition End
Fields.Description: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the end of switching.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Type: Transition Start
Fields.Description: The interpolation type at the start of switching.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Type: Transition End
Fields.Description: The interpolation type at the end of switching.

Fields.Name: Allow Horizontal Flip
Fields.Description: If enabled, allow horizontal flipping.

Fields.Name: Allow Front-to-back Flip
Fields.Description: If enabled, allow front-to-back flipping.

Fields.Name: Maintain Tilt
Fields.Description: If enabled, the camera will maintain its tilt.

Fields.Name: Add X-Axis Tilt
Fields.Description: If enabled, applies x-axis tilt to the camera.
